description:
Rediscover your music library.

Playback spins your Apple Music library on a tactile, cover-flow-style dial and resurfaces the songs and playlists you'd forgotten you loved.

SONGS
An endless rotation drawn from your own library. A bespoke algorithm walks from one track to the next, weighing similarity, energy, and how long it's been since you last listened — surfacing the hidden gems buried in your collection.

PLAYLISTS
You've got good taste; Playback brings it to the fore. The Playlists tab spins a dial through your Apple Music playlists and lands on one at random. Your collection, reshuffled, with none of the deciding.

DESIGN
Build a playlist by drawing its shape. Sketch an energy curve — from glacial calm up to full intensity — and Playback fills it with songs that rise and fall to match. Curate playlists to suit your mood.

PRIVATE BY DESIGN
No accounts. No tracking. No subscription. Your music library stays on your device, between you and Apple Music.

Playback requires an Apple Music subscription.
promotionalText: Spin through your Apple Music library to surface the playlists and songs you'd forgotten — and design new ones by drawing their energy. No accounts, no tracking.
